scenes.text:
In five seconds, your brain will
talk you out of anything.

Mel Robbins discovered that the moment you have an instinct to act on a goal, you have five seconds before your brain kills it. Five,
four, three, two, one, move. That is the rule. Do not give your brain time to negotiate, rationalize, or make excuses. Count down and act.

This is not just theory. This is neuroscience. The countdown activates your prefrontal cortex, the part
of your brain that handles decision-making and action. You are literally hacking your own brain.

Five seconds is all that separates
you from the life you want.

Try it right now. Five, four, three,
two, one, follow this page for more.
